evals.prompt: research Snowflake for me — I have a discovery call with their VP of Sales Engineering next Thursday
evals.expected_output: Should create a full dossier at ~/.agents/sales/snowflake/dossier.md. Should cover all research sections: What's Changing, Strategic Priorities, Hiring Signals, Company Overview, Industry Context, Key People. Should generate context-led conversation starters in Orlob's format (observation + relevance + question). Should include questions to explore.
assertions: Creates dossier at ~/.agents/sales/snowflake/dossier.md
Includes What's Changing section with recent news
Includes Strategic Priorities from executive statements
Includes Hiring Signals from job postings
Includes Company Overview with business model and size
Generates context-led conversation starters with observation + question format
Includes Questions to Explore section
Confirms completion with key findings summary

evals.prompt: update the research on Acme Corp — it's been a few weeks since we last looked
evals.expected_output: Should enter update mode. Should read the existing dossier, check the last_researched date, and run targeted research for changes since that date. Should update the dossier in place (not replace it). Should show what changed.
assertions: Reads existing dossier before researching
Runs targeted research (not full re-research)
Focuses on changes since last_researched date
Updates dossier in place rather than replacing
Reports what's new or changed

evals.prompt: I'm meeting with someone at First Federal Credit Union next week. Can you look them up?
evals.expected_output: Should create a full dossier AND activate the FI-specific layer for credit unions. Should include NCUA data (charter number, asset size, member count, field of membership). Should include service area demographics. Should still include all standard research sections.
assertions: Creates a standard dossier with all research sections
Activates the FI-specific layer for credit unions
Includes NCUA regulatory data
Includes field of membership information
Includes asset size context (small/medium/large)
Includes service area demographics

evals.prompt: prep me for HubSpot — they're a public company so there should be a lot out there
evals.expected_output: Should produce a rich dossier leveraging public company data: earnings call transcripts, investor presentations, SEC filings, analyst coverage. Strategic Priorities section should be especially detailed with named initiatives and executive quotes. Should capture exact executive language for conversation starters.
assertions: Leverages public company data sources (earnings calls, investor presentations)
Strategic Priorities section includes named initiatives from executive statements
Captures executive language and terminology
Conversation starters reference specific public data points
Company Overview includes financial metrics (revenue, growth)

evals.prompt: can you review where we stand with the Snowflake deal? I want to know what evidence we have
evals.expected_output: Should NOT run a deal review. Should redirect to the sales-deal-review skill. Should explain that this skill does external research, not deal health scoring from extractions.
assertions: Does NOT score deal health or review extractions
Redirects to sales-deal-review skill by name
Explains this skill only handles external research

evals.prompt:
here's the transcript from my call with Datadog today — can you process it?

[transcript text]
evals.expected_output: Should NOT process a transcript. Should redirect to the sales-transcript-extractor skill. Should explain that this skill researches companies from public sources, not from call transcripts.
assertions: Does NOT process the transcript
Redirects to sales-transcript-extractor skill by name
Clarifies this skill handles external research only
